name: The Prophecy Do Be Coming True
text:
the prophecy do be flying. the prophecy do be unblockable. the prophecy is become true and there is nothing for it.
Predict the next thing that happens at the table. you are correct. you have always been correct. this is the problem.
whenever you is right (always), the world is end a little. put a doom counter where the doom is go.
The Prophecy Do Be Coming True's power is however many times someone has said "no way" tonight. its toughness is also that, but sadder.
flavorText: told you. told you. told you. told you. told —

extras.fourthWall: counts how many times 'no way' is said
